⚡ Offline — Actions queued, will sync when connected
BARINV
First-time Setup
Staff? Enter Connect Code
Ask your admin for the connect code.
— OR ADMIN SETUP —
Step 1
Create a Supabase project
Go to supabase.com → New Project. Then open SQL Editor and run the schema.sql file included in this ZIP. Finally, go to Database → Replication and enable the events table for realtime.
Step 2
Enter your project credentials
Find these in: Supabase Dashboard → Settings → API
BARINV
Bar Inventory System
First time? Create admin account
Enter the 6-digit code your admin shared for tonight.

BLE Scale Debug
Find, identify, and connect to your Escali SC115KS
🎯 MY SCALE (Arboleaf / QN-KS)
200B52FB-F8FE-A00E-80DF-B3644586A272
4 attempts × 15 s, refresh peripheral via retrievePeripherals, cancel pending between tries, auto-subscribe to every NOTIFY char on success. Step on the scale before tapping.
Debug Log
Phase 1: Scan & Identify
Baseline-then-active is optional. For discovery, tap Scan All (60s) with scale ON and tap any device to select it.
📋 SAMPLE MARKERS (tap before each physical state change)
⚠ ORDER MATTERS: (1) tap Watch Ads, (2) tap "No weight", (3) STEP ON the scale or place a known object, (4) tap "Weight applied", (5) wait 5-10 s — watch for Δ=[…] in the log.
If scan returns 0 devices: tap Open iOS Settings and confirm Bluetooth toggle is ON for BARINV Pro. If it's off, turn it on and retry. If the toggle does not exist, delete and reinstall the app so iOS can re-ask for permission.
Phase 2: Connect & Discover
Select a device from scan results, then connect to explore its services.
Phase 3: Live Data Monitor
—

Giveaway Reasons
Codes used when recording COMP / SHOT / PROMO / WASTE / BREAKAGE. Edit applies_to to control which actions can use each reason.
⚠ Data Management
Destructive actions — admin only — 2-step confirmation required
🧹 Clean Night Data
Deletes all events, guestlist, VIP tables, shift reports, and POS snapshots for a specific night. Bars, staff, items, suppliers, and other nights are not touched.
📦 Full Backup (Export JSON)
Exports data as a JSON file you can save to your computer (Save to Files / AirDrop on iOS).
SCOPE
DATE RANGE (optional — leave empty for everything)
☁ Server-Side Backups
Full venue snapshots stored on the server. Auto-backed up daily at 4 AM UTC and before every destructive action. Retains last 30 daily + 12 monthly.
Tap Refresh to load backups…
♻ Restore from Backup
Load a previously exported JSON backup. Records with matching IDs are updated; new records are inserted.
